citation_short: Petri et al. FEMS Microbiology Letters
why_included: Developed soxB detection and compared soxB sequences across thiosulfate-oxidizing bacteria; useful baseline for marker-level donor/role units
Identified soxB in 121 phylogenetically diverse sulfur-oxidizing bacteria and reported topological discrepancies/lateral transfer events

citation_short: Ghosh et al. Research in Microbiology
why_included: Analyzed SoxXA SoxYZ and SoxCD with earlier SoxB data; reported extensive HGT plus gain/loss and coevolution regimes

citation_short: Gregersen et al. Frontiers in Microbiology
why_included: Reports GSB SOX acquisition from Proteobacteria and exchange within GSB; includes conserved soxJXYZAKBW cluster and missing soxCD context

citation_short: Berben et al. Frontiers in Microbiology
why_included: Mined 75 Thioalkalivibrio genomes for sulfur oxidation genes and discusses possible duplication/HGT in soxB and other sulfur genes

citation_short: SoxY gene family expansion in symbiotic sulfide oxidizers
why_included: Useful optional layer for role expansion/adaptation in sulfur-oxidizing symbionts; include only if enough extractable SOX-family rows are available

citation_short: YeeE-like bacterial SoxT proteins mediate sulfur import for oxidation
why_included: Useful boundary-role source for transport/regulatory integration around sulfur oxidation
